channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Westbrook has 'perfect' triple-double, 0 turnovers in Nuggets' 132-121 win over Jazz
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — Russell Westbrook became the second player in NBA history to have a triple-double with zero turnovers and shoot 100% from the field and the free-throw line in the Denver Nuggets' 132-121 win over the Utah Jazz on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW COLES, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: A jet carrying the Gonzaga men's basketball team ordered to stop to avoid collision at LAX
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Federal Aviation Administration has launched an investigation after a private jet carrying the Gonzaga University men’s basketball team nearly crossed a runway as another flight was taking off Friday at Los Angeles International Airport.
item.dc:creator: STEFANIE DAZIO and JAIMIE DING, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Roki Sasaki might visit 1 or 2 teams before deciding which club he wants to sign with
item.description: Prized Japanese free agent Roki Sasaki might visit one or two teams before deciding which club he wants to sign with.
item.dc:creator: Ronald Blum, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Five things to know for the Blues-Blackhawks Winter Classic
item.description: The St. Louis Blues and Chicago Blackhawks will close the 2024 calendar year with a head-to-head battle outdoors: The NHL Discover Winter Classic.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, WGN 9

item.title: Six former Florida State players sue coach Leonard Hamilton over failed NIL payments
item.description: TALLAHASSEE, Fla. (AP) — Six former Florida State basketball players sued Seminoles coach Leonard Hamilton on Monday, alleging he failed to make good on a promise to get each of them $250,000 in name, image and likeness compensation. The plaintiffs — Darin Green Jr.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: On his 40th, LeBron James says he could play "another 5 or 7 years." He won't stay around that long
item.description: EL SEGUNDO, Calif. (AP) — LeBron James celebrated his 40th birthday on Monday with gratitude for his basketball longevity and optimism about his future with the Los Angeles Lakers.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: 49ers-Lions pregame: Stakes somewhat silenced; roster moves announced
item.description: The 49ers (6-9) could secure last place in the NFC West with a loss tonight, but that still won't secure the NFC playoffs' No. 1 seed for the Detroit Lions (13-2).
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Dismal Man United loses again at home as Ipswich upsets Chelsea in Premier League
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Alexander Isak scored for the sixth straight Premier League game as Newcastle beat Manchester United 2-0 at Old Trafford on Monday to condemn Ruben Amorim’s side to its worst home run in the top tier since the 1970s.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: FBI issues warning to leagues about organized crime groups targeting pro athletes
item.description: The FBI is warning sports leagues about crime organizations targeting professional athletes following a string of burglaries at the homes of prominent NFL and NBA players.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Texas' Arch Manning shoots down transfer rumors ahead of CFP game
item.description: Texas Longhorns quarterback Arch Manning shot down rumors he planned on entering the transfer portal once the 2024-25 season was finished.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL Playoff Guide: Postseason bracket much clearer with 1 week remaining in regular season
item.description: It's Week 18 of the NFL season, which means just one more weekend remains before postseason action begins. The two-time defending Super Bowl champion Kansas City Chiefs and star quarterback Patrick Mahomes look like a formidable opponent once again and have already clinched the No.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NBC omits 'Redskins' from ex-star QB's jersey as Jayden Daniels sets franchise mark, draws fan backlash
item.description: NBC omitted the name "Redskins" from a graphic comparing Jayden Daniels and Robert Griffin III on Sunday as the Washington Commanders rookie set a record.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: PGA Tour star Viktor Hovland suffers freak bedroom injury as season begins
item.description: PGA Tour star Viktor Hovland's start to the 2025 season may be derailed after he suffered a fractured toe in a freak bedroom incident last week.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: JuJu Watkins scores 31 points to propel No. 4 Southern California past No. 23 Michigan 78-58
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — JuJu Watkins scored 31 points, making 13 of 14 free throws, and No. 4 Southern California beat No. 23 Michigan 78-58 on Sunday night in the Trojans’ Big Ten home opener. Watkins had five rebounds, seven assists, three steals and three blocks.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LeBron James at 40: A milestone birthday arrives Monday for the NBA's all-time scoring leader
item.description: When LeBron James broke another NBA record earlier this month, the one for most regular-season minutes played in a career, his Los Angeles Lakers teammates handled the moment in typical locker room fashion. They made fun of him. “They told me I’m old as hell,” James quipped.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Chip Kelly returns to the Rose Bowl, this time as Ohio State's offensive coordinator
item.description: Of all the things Chip Kelly is looking forward to in his return trip to Southern California, there is one that rises above everything else. “Gotta get more sunscreen looking at the weather report, because we haven’t seen the sun for a little while in Columbus," said Kelly with a wry smile.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Thompson-Herro fight leads to ejections of multiple players and coaches in Heat's victory in Houston
item.description: Rockets forward Amen Thompson threw Heat guard Tyler Herro to the floor to trigger an altercation that resulted in six ejections in the closing minute of Miami's 104-100 victory over Houston on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Herro leads Heat over Rockets in game marred by fight and ejections in final minute
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Tyler Herro scored 27 points before being one of seven people ejected, six for their roles in a fight in the final minute of the Miami Heat's 104-100 victory over the Houston Rockets on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Crosby breaks Lemieux's Penguins career assists record in 3-2 victory over the Islanders
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Sidney Crosby broke Mario Lemieux’s Pittsburgh franchise career record for assists on Michael Bunting’s power-play goal and the Penguins beat the New York Islanders 3-2 on Sunday night. Crosby has 1,034 assists, good for 12th in NHL history.
item.dc:creator: DAN SCIFO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Moment of silence for former President Jimmy Carter held before the Falcons-Commanders game
item.description: LANDOVER, Md. (AP) — Jimmy Carter was honored with a moment of silence before the Atlanta Falcons’ game at the Washington Commanders on Sunday night, hours after the 39th president of the United States died at the age of 100 in Plains, Georgia.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jake Evans scores for the career-high 4th consecutive game, surging Canadiens beat Lightning 5-2
item.description: Jake Evans scored for the career-high fifth consecutive game and the surging Montreal Canadiens beat the Tampa Bay Lightning 5-2 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Saquon Barkley tops 2,000 yards rushing as Eagles beat Cowboys 41-7 to clinch NFC East
item.description: Barkley rushed for 167 yards to top 2,000 on the season, backup quarterback Kenny Pickett ran and threw for scores before departing with injured ribs, and the Eagles clinched the division title by routing the Dallas Cowboys 41-7 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mayfield throws 5 TD passes and Bucs keep playoff, NFC South hopes alive with 48-14 rout of Panthers
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — The Tampa Bay Buccaneers played like a team determined to do whatever's necessary to make the playoffs.
item.dc:creator: FRED GOODALL, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Dodgers' Ohtani and wife will soon be welcoming a baby to the family
item.description: Between a marriage announcement, third MVP award and World Series title, Los Angeles Dodgers superstar Shohei Ohtani had a pretty good 2024. And now, it looks like 2025 may be even better for the Japanese two-way baseball phenom.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Column: The path of Matthew Stafford looms for Caleb Williams
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — A skilled quarterback burdened by the dysfunction of his organization, doomed to toil in mediocrity for over a decade despite a high level of performance year in and year out.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Sportscasting icon Greg Gumbel dies at 78
item.description: Sportscaster Greg Gumbel, best known for his long career with CBS Sports, has died Friday, Dec. 27, according to CBS Sports and Gumbel's family.
item.dc:creator: Bill Disbrow, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Athletics president Dave Kaval will resign from organization in the coming days
item.description: (AP) -- Athletics president Dave Kaval will resign from the organization after being the public face of the organization's planned move from Oakland to Las Vegas. Kaval has been president of the A's for the past eight years and will step down from the role on Dec.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: At least 65 million tune in for Netflix NFL Christmas Day games. NBA holiday ratings also skyrocket
item.description: LeBron James and the NBA are going to have make room for the NFL on Christmas. That shouldn't be a problem. Both leagues were winners on Wednesday. Netflix set records as the most-streamed NFL games in U.S. history while the NBA had its best holiday numbers in five years according to Nielsen.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY and TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Holiday Bowl to kick off at brand-new Snapdragon Stadium for the first time
item.description: The Holiday Bowl has been woven into the fabric of San Diego for four decades. For a football city without a professional sports team, there is even more excitement surrounding this annual event.
item.dc:creator: Jaime Chambers, Fox 5

item.title: Holiday Bowl football players visit SeaWorld San Diego
item.description: Football players from the two teams facing off in the DIRECTV Holiday Bowl spent a few hours Wednesday morning celebrating Christmas at SeaWorld San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Beyoncé's performance highlighted Netflix's NFL debut on Christmas Day
item.description: Beyoncé provided more excitement than either game during Netflix’s NFL debut on Christmas Day. Riding into her halftime appearance on a white horse, the 32-time Grammy winner rocked her hometown Houston crowd with a nearly 13-minute performance on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5
